changelog.notes:
**Bulk Analysis Cancellation**: Stop long-running AI analysis tasks anytime.
**Improved UX**: Confirmation dialog before starting bulk analysis and direct links to AI settings from incomplete tins.
**Enhanced AI recommendations**: Structured pipe recommendations (Type, Explanation, Examples) are now part of the automated analysis.
**Performance & Stability**: Fixed issues with non-interruptible background tasks and improved UI responsiveness.

AI Precision & Pipe Compatibility. Structured pipe recommendations (Type, Explanation, Examples). Room Note Scale Inversion (1=Pleasant, 10=Strong). Improved AI scanning precision and mandatory field population. Updated Export/Import & Backup systems for new data.

### New Features
- **📊 Room Note Scale Inversion**: Room Note is now consistently represented on an intensity scale where 1 is Unnoticeable and 10 is Overwhelming.
### Improvements
- **🎨 UI Refinement**: Clarified Room Note intensity scale in tobacco characteristics view.
- **🧠 AI Scanner Precision**: Enhanced Gemini prompts to better align with the 1-10 Room Note intensity scale.
- **🔄 Database Migration**: Automatically inverted existing Room Note values to maintain consistency with the new intensity-based scale.

### New Features
- **🧠 Intelligent Recommendation Engine**: Now considers tobacco strength and taste intensity, providing time-of-day appropriate suggestions (mild for morning, full for evening).
- **🧪 Advanced Virtual Blending**: AI-powered blending recipes now leverage full tobacco characteristics (Strength, Flavoring, Room Note, Taste) for more accurate "tribute" blends.
### Improvements
- **☕ Enhanced AI Pairings**: Pairings now account for strength and flavoring intensity for better beverage and activity recommendations.
- **🎨 UI Refinement**: Updated Wishlist and Tin Group views to better integrate tobacco characteristics.

- **⚙️ Diagnostic Logging**: Added information icon to 'Enable Debug Logging' to assist with issue reporting.
- **🔄 Manual Update Check**: Added a 'Check for update' button in settings.
- **📦 Data Export/Import**: Enhanced backup/restore with more fields (quantities, finished date, etc.) and better metadata handling.
- **🧪 Testing**: Added comprehensive E2E tests for cloud backup and restore lifecycle.

### Improvements
- **⚙️ Diagnostic Logging**: Added information icon to 'Enable Debug Logging' to assist with issue reporting.
- **🔄 Manual Update Check**: Added a 'Check for update' button in settings for better control over update discovery.
Refined Bulk Analysis persistence and added AI Preview screen.

### New Features
- **📦 Incremental Bulk Analysis**: AI analysis of your collection is now more responsive, providing real-time UI updates as each group is processed.
- **🔄 Automatic Data Sync**: Adding a tin with AI-scanned characteristics now automatically updates the associated brand/blend group for a more unified view.
### Improvements
- **⚙️ State Management**: Refined the inventory state logic to ensure the UI remains snappy during long-running bulk operations.

### Improvements
- **⚙️ AI Data Sanitization**: Added robustness to Gemini service for parsing tobacco characteristics from AI output.
- **🎨 UI Polish**: Improved stability in the Edit Tin screen with safer integer handling.

### New Features
- **📦 Tobacco Characteristics in Tin Groups**: Added Strength, Flavoring, Room Note and Taste visualization to the Tin Group screen.
### Improvements
- **⚙️ AI Analysis UI**: Refined Settings screen for clearer bulk analysis progress.
- **🔄 Data Import**: Enhanced validation and handling of tobacco characteristics during JSON imports.
